_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Pi runtime + per-tab runtime selection in AI Assistant chat

steps.description: Implement orch/chat/pi/ subpackage (jsonl_reader LF-only, rpc_client, runtime with LRU + idle reaper, event_normalizer); extend ALLOWED_RUNTIMES; wire /api/chat/config?runtime=pi; wire PiRuntime in dashboard lifespan; create Pi TypeScript extension agents/pi/extensions/iw-chat-approvals/; extend sync_agents to copy extensions + pi_extensions_synced counter; extend skills_commands CLI output

Per-agent code review of S01 (LF-only reader correctness, LRU eviction + idle reaper safety, event normalization completeness, policy parsing correctness, lazy spawn semantics, sync-engine extension copy)
Runtime dropdown gains 'Pi' option; chat.js re-fetches model list on runtime change; per-tab model dropdown restricted to active tab's runtime

Unit tests (Unicode-separator regression, LRU eviction, idle reaper, ABC compliance, event normalization, sync extensions, allowlist) + integration tests (mixed-tab independence, Pi approval flow, Pi lifecycle) with stub pi binary on PATH
Cross-agent global review: ABC contract honoured; event normalizer covers every Pi event type; approval round-trip end-to-end; sync engine preserves existing 30 agents/pi/*.md files
QV: Browser verification — open 1 OpenCode + 2 Pi tabs with different models, send prompts, abort one Pi tab, trigger approval modal via 'ask' policy, reload and verify persistence
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
